message.content:
@startuml
title create file, add, reset, delete

actor User
box "GIT                                    jalbertomr.blogspot.com" #LightGray
participant "Working dir" as WD #red
participant "Stage" as Stage #green
database "History" as History
end box

== create file2, add, reset, delete ==

User -> WD : create file2
note right of Stage : file2 created

WD -> Stage : **git add file2**
note right of Stage : file2 created

Stage -> WD : **git [ reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2 ]**
note right of Stage : file2 created

WD --> User : delete file2

@enduml
